description: Bundle of 5 UI and game logic fixes: (1) Province name colored in BattleBiddingOverlay, (2) Seppuku kills ALL own bushi instead of capping at bid amount, (3) SpringIcon as cherry blossom and AutumnIcon as maple leaf, (4) Betray honor loss when alliance broken, (5) Remove 'Players' header from PlayerPanel sidebar.
steps: 1. In src/components/BattleBiddingOverlay.tsx: Add a new prop `provinceColor?: string` to BattleBiddingOverlayProps. In the header where provinceName is rendered, apply `style={{ color: provinceColor }}` to color the province name. Also import PROVINCE_COLORS from types/game.ts and add a `provinceId` prop as fallback lookup.
2. In src/components/BattlePanel.tsx: Pass `provinceColor={PROVINCE_COLORS[battle.provinceId]}` to all BattleBiddingOverlay render calls (there are 2 places - around lines 396 and 454).

3. In src/utils/gameLogic.ts at the seppuku case (~line 1815): Change `const killCount = Math.min(ownFigures.length, highestBid);` to `const killCount = ownFigures.length;` so that seppuku kills ALL own bushi in the province (the bid only determines who wins the tactic, not how many figures die).

4. In src/components/Icons.tsx: Replace the SpringIcon SVG with a proper cherry blossom (5 heart-shaped petals with notches at the tips radiating from center, with stamen dots). Replace the AutumnIcon SVG with a proper maple leaf (the palmate shape with 5-7 pointed lobes and a stem).

5. In src/utils/gameLogic.ts, verify the executeBetray function (~line 1072). The loseHonor call is already there within the `if (issuer.allies.length > 0)` block. The likely bug is in the server handler: in src/server/index.ts (~line 135) the CHOOSE_MANDATE handler calls `advancePlayer(s)` immediately after `chooseMandateTile`, which resets betrayMandateActive and may interfere with the state. Add a check: only call advancePlayer if NOT (betrayMandateActive or trainMandateActive or marshalMandateActive or recruitMandateActive or harvestMandateActive). This mirrors what the client-side store does.

6. In src/components/PlayerPanel.tsx: Remove the `

Players

` line (around line 22).
acceptance_criteria: BattleBiddingOverlay shows the province name colored with the province color
Seppuku kills ALL own bushi in the province regardless of coins bid, giving 1 VP and 1 honor position per kill
SpringIcon renders a cherry blossom shape
AutumnIcon renders a maple leaf shape
Server-side CHOOSE_MANDATE handler does not call advancePlayer when betray mandate is active, preserving the honor track change
PlayerPanel sidebar does not show 'Players' text header
TypeScript compilation passes with no errors
verification: Run `npx tsc -b` in /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent to confirm no TypeScript errors
